value.found_quote: Trace grading is the process of assigning structured scores or labels to an agent's trace—the end-to-end log of decisions, tool calls, and reasoning steps—to assess correctness, quality, or adherence to expectations... Trace evals use those graded traces to systematically evaluate agent performance across many examples, helping to benchmark changes, identify regressions, or validate improvements.
value.name: Trace Grading & Eval
